description: Most recent serum creatinine increase from baseline is less than 50%.

description: Most recent eGFR value is at least 30 mL/min/1.73m².

description: Most recent serum creatinine increase from baseline is in the range 50% to 100%.

description: Most recent serum creatinine absolute value is in the range 221 to 309 μmol/L.

description: Most recent serum creatinine absolute value exceeds 309 μmol/L.

description: Most recent serum potassium exceeds 5.5 mmol/L.
